title: pose-catalog-pipeline: named erotic positions with structured attributes and COCO-17 keypoint templates
description: Reproducibility code for the Erotic Pose Catalog dataset: a public, machine-readable catalog of 104 named erotic positions (solo and multi-person) unifying a controlled-vocabulary attribute layer, an idealised COCO-17 keypoint template per participant, and a cross-cultural provenance layer that maps modern positions to the historical sex manuals and erotic-art traditions that first recorded them. The pipeline is deterministic and needs no database and no API keys. Includes the canonical vocabularies, the keypoint compositor, the HuggingFace dataset export, and a methodology paper. Data is released under CC BY 4.0; Wikidata anchors are CC0.
